import { useState } from "react"; import { useLogin } from "../hooks/useLogin"; import { Link } from "react-router-dom"; import { useTheme } from '../hooks/useTheme'; const Login = () => { const [email, setEmail] = useState(""); const [password, setPassword] = useState(""); const { login, error, isLoading } = useLogin(); const { isDarkMode } = useTheme(); const handleSubmit = async (e) => { e.preventDefault(); await login(email, password); }; return (
